spec_match.rationale: Generates real WGSL code using bufferView<T>(&payload, offset) — the exact reinterpretation syntax from the proposal.

interactive.rationale: Spinbuttons for buffer size/offset, dropdown for target type (vec4f/mat4x4f/arrayu32), button generates live WGSL code.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Promises a typed view builder; delivers real WGSL generation.

edge_cases.rationale: Covers multiple types but doesn't demonstrate type mismatch errors.

references.rationale: Links to chromestatus and gpuweb proposal.

runtime_evidence.rationale: Browser-tested: generated bufferView<vec4<f32>> at offset 32. No console errors.
